'''Zalk't''' was the [[Vratix/Legends|Vratix]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] during the [[Swarm War]]. He was on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the time of the [[Coup on Thyferra|Tarhead Coup]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'', the Thyferran senator outlines a nine-point plan for peace with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. This is possibly Zalk't.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
